agents.connectorDescriptions.cherryStudi: Use Cherry Studio with an OpenAI-compatible SiftGate endpoint.
agents.connectorDescriptions.claudeCode: Use Claude Code with a Claude-style SiftGate endpoint and profile-scoped smart model.
agents.connectorDescriptions.cline: Use Cline with an OpenAI-compatible SiftGate endpoint and coding virtual models.
agents.connectorDescriptions.codex: Use Codex with an OpenAI-compatible SiftGate endpoint.
agents.connectorDescriptions.continue: Use Continue with SiftGate as an OpenAI-compatible model provider.
agents.connectorDescriptions.cursor: Use Cursor with a SiftGate OpenAI-compatible base URL and workspace policy.
agents.connectorDescriptions.genericAnth: Use any Anthropic-compatible client with a SiftGate root endpoint.
agents.connectorDescriptions.genericOpen: Use any OpenAI-compatible client with the SiftGate /v1 endpoint.
agents.connectorDescriptions.hermes: Use Hermes with an OpenAI-compatible SiftGate endpoint.
agents.connectorDescriptions.openCode: Use OpenCode with an OpenAI-compatible SiftGate provider config.
agents.connectorDescriptions.openclaw: Use OpenClaw with an OpenAI-compatible SiftGate endpoint.
agents.connectorDescriptions.rooCode: Use Roo Code with an OpenAI-compatible SiftGate endpoint and safe setup snippets.
agents.description: Create agent profiles that use gateway keys, local policy, and optional smart routing.
agents.empty.description: Create a profile for Codex, Claude Code, Cherry Studio, Hermes, OpenClaw, or a compatible client.
agents.empty.title: No agent profiles yet
agents.errors.connectorRequired: Choose a connector before creating the profile.
agents.errors.invalidRoutingHint: Routing hint must be a valid JSON object.
agents.fields.name: Name
agents.help.apiKey: Agents and chatbots must use a Gateway API key; provider keys stay in Nodes or secret references.
agents.help.directModelSelect: Choose from configured node models, or enter a custom model id below.
agents.help.directModelUnavailable: No node models are available yet. Enter a model id manually after configuring Nodes.
agents.help.routingHint: Optional JSON advisory hints for routing. Policy is still enforced.
agents.list.description: Profiles are scoped entry points for agent clients and chatbot tools.
agents.list.title: Profiles
agents.mcp.unavailable: No MCP servers are currently available.
agents.placeholders.description: Local profile for an agent client
agents.placeholders.name: Claude Code local
agents.preset.chooseConnector: Choose the agent or chatbot client first so SiftGate can set the correct protocol, base URL mode, and smart model.
agents.preset.gatewayKeyOnly: Use the rendered Gateway API key marker in the client. Do not paste provider API keys here.
agents.preset.title: Client preset
agents.privacy.gatewayKey: Gateway API key is for agents and chatbots.
agents.privacy.noStoredSecrets: Rendered configs do not expose stored secrets.
agents.privacy.noSourceCode: Source code, prompts, diffs, and tool payloads are not stored by default.
agents.privacy.providerKeys: Provider API keys stay in Nodes, env vars, or secret references.
agents.privacy.smartRouter: Smart router uses auto or a connector-safe virtual model.
agents.privacy.title: Local-first safety
agents.render.description: Generate redacted setup snippets for the selected profile.
agents.render.emptyDescription: Choose a profile and render its connector card.
agents.render.title: Rendered config
agents.routing.directDescription: Send an explicit model name through the same Gateway API key and policy checks.
agents.routing.smartDescription: Use auto or a connector-safe virtual model for SiftGate routing.
agents.sessions.description: Recent coding-agent sessions grouped from metadata-only call logs.
agents.sessions.emptyDescription: Send traffic from Cursor, Cline, Roo Code, Continue, Codex, Claude Code, OpenCode, or a compatible agent to see sessions here.
agents.sessions.title: Recent Coding Agent Sessions
agents.title: Agent Profiles
agents.warnings.apiKeyRequired.descripti: Pick an active Gateway API key so the rendered config can be used directly by the agent or chatbot.
agents.warnings.apiKeyRequired.title: Gateway API key required
agents.warnings.connectorRequired.descri: The connector controls the rendered snippets, safe virtual model, and base URL mode.
agents.warnings.connectorRequired.title: Choose the client connector
agents.warnings.noApiKeys.description: Create a Gateway API key first, then return here and bind it to this profile. Provider API keys stay in Nodes or secret references.
agents.warnings.noApiKeys.title: No Gateway API keys available
